items.summary: Rename the 'Chat with me' section label to 'Chat with Nobita' everywhere it appears in the app — navigation links, page headings, dashboard portal card, and any route titles.

Replace the current static/canned bot response logic in ChatPage.tsx and botResponses.ts with an intelligent rule-based conversational AI engine that can understand and respond meaningfully to a wide variety of user questions and topics. The bot persona must be 'Nobita' — friendly, funny, childlike, and Doraemon-universe flavored. Implement topic detection (greetings, questions, emotions, school/homework, gadgets, friendship, love, food, weather, general knowledge, jokes, etc.) with contextual, varied, and funny replies for each topic. The bot should never give a generic 'I don't know' — it should always attempt a clever, in-character Nobita-style answer.

Add at least 3 new funny/entertaining mini-games to the GamesPage and corresponding routes. Suggested games: (1) Doraemon Gadget Clicker — click as many gadgets as possible before time runs out; (2) Nobita's Exam Quiz — funny multiple-choice quiz with Doraemon trivia questions and silly wrong answers; (3) Whack-a-Doraemon — a whack-a-mole style game where Doraemon characters pop up and the player clicks them for points. Each game should have a playful Doraemon-themed UI, a score display, and a restart button.
